components.name: AdGuard Filters (Mobile + Japanese)
components.notes:
Includes AdGuard Mobile and AdGuard Japanese rulesets.
Enabled rulesets from External/ublock-rulesets.json: AdGuard/uBO – Mobile Ads (adguard-mobile), 🇯🇵jp: AdGuard Japanese (jpn-1).

components.name: EasyList + EasyPrivacy
components.notes:
Includes EasyList and EasyPrivacy ruleset subscriptions.
Enabled rulesets from External/ublock-rulesets.json: EasyList (easylist), EasyPrivacy (easyprivacy).

components.name: kanji-processor
components.notes: Source of the kanji list files used in text preprocessors.

components.name: uAssets Filters
components.notes:
Provides uBlock-maintained rulesets used by content blocking.
Enabled rulesets from External/ublock-rulesets.json: uBlock filters – Ads, trackers, and more (ublock-filters), uBlock filters – Badware risks (ublock-badware).

components.name: Zstandard (zstd)
components.notes: Vendored C sources compiled via the SwiftZSTD package target at Sources/zstdlib.
